_comment: Read-path list-table descriptors for TIER-2 read-structure heals (column/table drift). NOT consulted by current code — reads use parse.mjs keyword heuristics (findTable/strongPairs), so this file is descriptive scaffolding for future autonomous read healing and for Claude to consult on a HEAL_NEEDED. area.key -> { headerKeywords[]: words that identify the right <table>, columns{name->index}, containerSel }.
